creator: ijakoofiromsaa@gmail.com
text:
All Bugzilla comments follow https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?id=3bfbb521fef5 
 https://geometrylite.org rules to ensure communication.

Login to your Bugzilla account.
Open a specific record and proceed to the comment section.
Enter your comment text and click "preview".
Then click "quick edit help" to continue editing.
Having difficulties adding material or changing comments after clicking "quick edit help"?

After using the "preview" and "quick edit help" options, users will be able to add and modify comments as normal.
